markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if complete Federal Register data becomes available.
markets.rules_primary: If the President signs above 800 Executive Orders during his second term, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: An Executive Order must be formally titled "Executive Order" followed by a number, signed by the President, and published in the Federal Register. Presidential Memoranda, Proclamations, Determinations, and other executive actions that are not formally numbered Executive Orders do not count. The signing date as recorded in the Federal Register determines which period an Executive Order belongs to, using ET timezone. Classified Executive Orders count if acknowledged by number. Executive Orders that are later revoked still count for the period they were signed. The Federal Register is the primary source; alternative sources are used only if the Federal Register explicitly states data is incomplete.
markets.title: Will the President sign more than 800 Executive Orders between Jan 20, 2025 and Jan 20, 2029?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if all elections have been decided and margins calculated.
markets.rules_primary: If Wisconsin has the smallest margin of victory among all elections in the 2026 United States gubernatorial elections as of Jan 20, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Margin of victory is calculated as the absolute percentage point difference between first and second place finishers. If official results aren't available by the deadline but at least 95% of expected vote is counted, preliminary results are used. In case of identical margins (tied to the hundredth of a percentage point), tied options split the payout equally. Postponed elections or those without sufficient results by the deadline resolve to No.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a new leader is announced.
markets.rules_primary: If Zhao Leji is announced as the first new non-interim leader of the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) before Jan 1, 2045, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves when the first new non-interim leader is officially announced by the party or credible sources. The person need not have taken office before the deadline date, only be announced as the incoming leader. Interim or acting leaders do not qualify unless they are subsequently announced as the permanent leader. If multiple persons are simultaneously announced as co-leaders, the market resolves proportionally. Leadership contests that extend beyond the deadline date without an announcement resolve to No. The announcement must come from official party channels or be confirmed by multiple credible news sources.
markets.title: Will Zhao Leji become the next leader of the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) before Jan 1, 2045?

markets.rules_primary: If Jerome Powell has either officially announced their intention to leave as member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System or has actually left as member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System before Aug 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves to Yes upon either an official announcement of departure or actual departure from office. An announcement must be made by the person themselves, their authorized representative, or the governing body of the office and reported by at least one Source Agency. Announcements of leaving more than one year from the statement do not resolve the market to Yes. Leaving office includes resignation, termination, removal, impeachment and removal, recall, or term expiration without renewal. Temporary absences such as medical leave, suspension with possibility of return, or delegation of duties while retaining office do NOT qualify. Death does NOT satisfy the Payout Criterion. Forced departures satisfy the criterion even without prior announcement.
markets.title: Will Jerome Powell leave Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System before Aug 1, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the participant performs in Eurovision.
markets.rules_primary: If Slovenia has performed as an official entry in the Eurovision Song Contest 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: To qualify as participation, the country/broadcaster must be confirmed by the EBU or national broadcaster to represent a country AND must perform their entry as part of the competition (either in a Semi-Final or Grand Final). The performance must be a numbered competition entry eligible for voting. Opening acts, interval acts, or other non-competitive performances do not count. Markets resolve to Yes even if the participant is later disqualified or penalized, as long as they performed. Withdrawal before performance (voluntary or involuntary) results in No resolution. Mere inclusion on the participant list without actual performance does not qualify.

The performance must be a numbered competition entry eligible for voting. Opening acts, interval acts, or other non-competitive performances do not count. Markets resolve to Yes even if the participant is later disqualified or penalized, as long as they performed. Withdrawal before performance (voluntary or involuntary) results in No resolution. Mere inclusion on the participant list without actual performance does not qualify.
markets.title: Will Estonia officially participate in Eurovision Song Contest 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the ban is officially announced.
markets.rules_primary: If Israel has been announced to have been banned from Eurovision 2026 before May 12, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: A ban must be formally announced by the official governing body or organizer of the event. This includes formal prohibitions, sanctions, suspensions, or exclusions that explicitly prohibit participation. Voluntary withdrawals, boycotts, or non-qualification due to poor performance do not count. Speculation or threats without official enforcement do not qualify. Individual bans may not constitute a country ban unless the individual is the sole representative. The ban only needs to be announced (not enforced) before the deadline to trigger resolution.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if all relevant elections are completed and certified.
markets.rules_primary: If at least 5 members of the Senate Democrats lose re-election in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Members count as losing re-election if they actively seek re-election (by filing candidacy or appearing on ballot) but fail to win. This includes losses in primaries, general elections, runoffs, retention elections, or recalls. Members who retire, withdraw before primaries, die, resign, or are disqualified do not count as losses. If redistricting forces two group members against each other, the loser counts. Members who switch parties after issuance remain part of the original group. If a member loses their party primary but wins as an independent, they did not lose re-election.
markets.title: Will at least 5 Senate Democrats lose re-election in 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a qualifying declaration of candidacy occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If J.B. Pritzker is the first individual in this list to publicly declare their candidacy for 2028 United States presidential election after Issuance and before Nov 7, 2028, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: A declaration of candidacy requires both filing the appropriate candidacy form (Form 2 with FEC for federal elections or equivalent state/local form) AND a clear, unambiguous public statement explicitly declaring intention to seek the office. The declaration must be made directly by the person or their officially authorized representatives, explicitly reference the specific office, be publicly accessible through Source Agencies, and occur after market issuance. Formation of exploratory committees, third-party statements, media speculation, "considering" statements, private communications, or fundraising without explicit declaration do not qualify. The person must be legally eligible to hold the office under applicable constitutional and statutory requirements.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the election winner is officially declared or certified.
markets.rules_primary: If the winner of the next Colombian presidential election scheduled to be held in 2026 (at the latest) is Santiago Botero, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves based on the official certification or declaration by the relevant electoral authority. For a presidential or other direct election, the winner is the candidate who is officially declared elected by that authority and is subsequently sworn in, or whose inauguration date passes without a different person taking office. The market will resolve for that candidate even if they die or are incapacitated after the election but before taking office. If an election is postponed, the contract remains open until the new date, for a maximum of two years. Contested results are resolved based on the final certified outcome by the appropriate electoral authority or highest court with jurisdiction.
markets.subtitle: :: Romper el Sistema
markets.title: Will Santiago Botero win the next Colombian presidential election?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Florida redistricts its Congressional districts for the elections in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
New congressional district maps must be formally adopted and enacted into law by the appropriate legislative or redistricting authority; AND not enjoined, vacated, stayed, or struck down in full by any court with jurisdiction over congressional redistricting in the geography as of the Expiration Date; AND in effect for use in the first scheduled federal election after its adoption, then the market resolves to Yes.

 
For clarity: maps that are temporarily stayed pending appeal but later upheld will resolve to "Yes" if they are ultimately in effect by the Expiration Date, maps that are completely redrawn by a court or special master will resolve to "No", maps that are withdrawn by the Legislature before implementation will resolve to "No", and if no new maps are adopted by the date, the market will resolve to "No".
markets.title: What states will redistrict before the 2026 Congressional elections?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the election winner is officially declared or certified.
markets.rules_primary: If Brazil Union wins 2026 Brazilian Senate election, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market resolves based on the official certification or declaration by the relevant electoral authority. For a parliamentary election, the winner is the party or formal pre-election coalition that wins the most seats in the specified chamber, even if they do not form the government. If there is a tie for the most seats, the winner is the party that enters government; if that doesn't resolve the tie, the winner is the party with the higher share of the vote. If an election is postponed, the contract remains open until the new date, for a maximum of two years. Contested results are resolved based on the final certified outcome by the appropriate electoral authority or highest court with jurisdiction.


Partial elections: Only seats/positions actually contested in the specified election count


If a formal pre-election coalition wins the most seats, the contract for that coalition resolves to Yes, while contracts for its individual member parties (if also listed) resolve to No.
markets.subtitle: :: UNIÃO
markets.title: Will Brazil Union win the 2026 Brazilian Senate election?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the person announces departure or actually leaves office.
markets.rules_primary: If Jessica Tisch has either officially announced their intention to leave NYPD Commissioner or has actually left NYPD Commissioner before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves to Yes upon either an official announcement of departure or actual departure from office. An announcement must be made by the person themselves, their authorized representative, or the governing body of the office and reported by at least one Source Agency. Announcements of leaving more than one year from the statement do not resolve the market to Yes. Leaving office includes resignation, termination, removal, impeachment and removal, recall, or term expiration without renewal. Temporary absences such as medical leave, suspension with possibility of return, or delegation of duties while retaining office do NOT qualify. Death does NOT satisfy the Payout Criterion. Forced departures satisfy the criterion even without prior announcement.
markets.title: Will Jessica Tisch leave NYPD Commissioner before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a snap election is officially announced.
markets.rules_primary: If France officially announces a snap election for its national legislature or head of government before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: A snap election announcement must be made by a person or body with legal authority to call elections in the specified country and must specify an actual election date. The election must be called to occur at least 90 days earlier than either the previously scheduled election date or the latest constitutionally required date. The announcement itself must occur before the deadline at 11:59 PM ET, regardless of when the election is scheduled. Examples that qualify include: Prime Minister dissolving parliament for early elections, President resigning triggering constitutionally-mandated early elections, votes of no confidence requiring new elections, or governing coalition collapse leading to early elections. Regional or local elections do not qualify - only national elections for the legislature or head of government count. If an announcement is later withdrawn or ruled invalid before expiration, the market resolves to No. Snap elections announced before market issuance but held after issuance do not qualify.
markets.title: Will France announce a snap election before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a person is formally appointed and invested as Prime Minister.
markets.rules_primary: If Viktor Orbán becomes Prime Minister of Hungary as a result of government formation following the 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election and meets all constitutional requirements before May 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this contract, **these rules will satisfy the payout criterion:**

- The person must be formally appointed, sworn in, or invested according to the country's constitutional procedures and command the confidence of the parliament/legislature through an investiture vote, formal approval, or constitutional convention.
- They must exercise the full powers of the office, not serve in a caretaker or acting capacity from the previous government.
- The appointment must stem from the government formation process following the specified election.

Serving as caretaker pending government formation, being designated to form a government but not yet invested, leading the party with most seats without forming government, being named as designate without completing constitutional requirements, or holding the position temporarily during coalition negotiations **do NOT satisfy the Payout Criterion**.

Special situations:

- If no government forms by the deadline, all markets resolve to No except "No one" if that option exists.
- If new elections are called before government formation, markets resolve immediately.
- For rotating arrangements, the first person to meet all criteria resolves to Yes.
- If the person leading a party dies before taking office, their market resolves to last fair price and their successor may resolve to Yes.
- Markets for persons not explicitly listed resolve to "Other" if that option exists.
markets.title: Will Viktor Orbán become Prime Minister of Hungary following the 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election?

Interim or acting leaders do not qualify unless they are subsequently announced as the permanent leader. If multiple persons are simultaneously announced as co-leaders, the market resolves proportionally. Leadership contests that extend beyond the deadline date without an announcement resolve to No. The announcement must come from official party channels or be confirmed by multiple credible news sources.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Virginia redistricts its Congressional districts for the elections in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
New congressional district maps must be formally adopted and enacted into law by the appropriate legislative or redistricting authority; AND not enjoined, vacated, stayed, or struck down in full by any court with jurisdiction over congressional redistricting in the geography as of the Expiration Date; AND in effect for use in the first scheduled federal election after its adoption, then the market resolves to Yes.

 
For clarity: maps that are temporarily stayed pending appeal but later upheld will resolve to "Yes" if they are ultimately in effect by the Expiration Date, maps that are completely redrawn by a court or special master will resolve to "No", maps that are withdrawn by the Legislature before implementation will resolve to "No", and if no new maps are adopted by the date, the market will resolve to "No".
markets.title: What states will redistrict before the 2026 Congressional elections?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the wedding occurs and the role is confirmed.
markets.rules_primary: If Kylie Kelce served as a Bridesmaid at the wedding ceremony of Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift that occurred before Jan 1, 2030, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The person must serve in the specified role at the actual wedding ceremony, not merely at the rehearsal, reception, or other wedding events. If the person is listed in the wedding program or announced as having the role but does not attend or participate, the market resolves to No. If the person serves as a substitute or replacement in the role during the ceremony itself, the market resolves to Yes. If the couple has multiple ceremonies (religious and civil), the person must serve in the role in at least one ceremony. If the wedding is cancelled or indefinitely postponed beyond the date, the market resolves to No for all strikes. If the couple has only a legal marriage without any ceremony involving a wedding party, the market resolves to No. Resolution is based on official wedding announcements, wedding programs, ceremony materials, and reporting from major media outlets including The New York Times, People Magazine, Vogue, official social media accounts, and verified photography or videography from the wedding.
markets.title: Will Kylie Kelce be a Bridesmaid for the wedding of Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift?

markets.rules_secondary: The person must serve in the specified role at the actual wedding ceremony, not merely at the rehearsal, reception, or other wedding events. If the person is listed in the wedding program or announced as having the role but does not attend or participate, the market resolves to No. If the person serves as a substitute or replacement in the role during the ceremony itself, the market resolves to Yes. If the couple has multiple ceremonies (religious and civil), the person must serve in the role in at least one ceremony. If the wedding is cancelled or indefinitely postponed beyond the date, the market resolves to No for all strikes. If the couple has only a legal marriage without any ceremony involving a wedding party, the market resolves to No. Resolution is based on official wedding announcements, wedding programs, ceremony materials, and reporting from major media outlets including The New York Times, People Magazine, Vogue, official social media accounts, and verified photography or videography from the wedding.
markets.title: Will Alana Haim be a Bridesmaid for the wedding of Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Indiana redistricts its Congressional districts for the elections in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
New congressional district maps must be formally adopted and enacted into law by the appropriate legislative or redistricting authority; AND not enjoined, vacated, stayed, or struck down in full by any court with jurisdiction over congressional redistricting in the geography as of the Expiration Date; AND in effect for use in the first scheduled federal election after its adoption, then the market resolves to Yes.

 
For clarity: maps that are temporarily stayed pending appeal but later upheld will resolve to "Yes" if they are ultimately in effect by the Expiration Date, maps that are completely redrawn by a court or special master will resolve to "No", maps that are withdrawn by the Legislature before implementation will resolve to "No", and if no new maps are adopted by the date, the market will resolve to "No".
markets.title: What states will redistrict before the 2026 Congressional elections?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the party's ballot status is officially confirmed.
markets.no_sub_title: a party founded by Elon Musk
markets.rules_primary: If a party founded by Elon Musk contests the 2028 U.S. presidential election by having at least one candidate officially on the ballot before Sep 1, 2028, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: A party "contests" an election if they have at least one candidate on the official ballot under the party name, participate in a formal coalition on the ballot, or have officially endorsed candidates with clear party affiliation. The party does NOT contest if they only endorse other parties' candidates, announce a boycott, fail to meet ballot access requirements, or only challenge results after voting without having participated. For multi-round elections, appearing on any round's ballot counts. For federal systems, contesting in any state/province counts for the federal election. If the election is postponed but occurs within one year, the contract remains valid. If cancelled or not held within one year, the market resolves to No.
markets.title: Will a party founded by Elon Musk contest the 2028 U.S. presidential election?
markets.yes_sub_title: a party founded by Elon Musk

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the deployment occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If GTE has successfully deployed on MegaETH mainnet before the sooner of the day after MegaETH launches and Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: A successful deployment requires that smart contracts or code for the protocol have been deployed to the specified blockchain mainnet (not testnet), the deployment has been officially announced or confirmed by the protocol team, core functionality of the protocol is operational on the blockchain, users can interact with the protocol through at least one interface (web app, CLI, or direct contract interaction), and the deployment is publicly accessible (not restricted to whitelisted addresses only). Full protocol launch with all features operational counts as deployment, as does partial deployment with core features operational (e.g., beta or v1 launch), migration of existing protocol from another blockchain, deployment of a new version or fork of the protocol, multi-chain expansion where the specified blockchain is added as a supported network, or deployment through official bridges or cross-chain infrastructure. Testnet deployments regardless of functionality do not count as deployment, nor do announcements of future deployment without actual smart contract deployment, deployment of placeholder or proxy contracts without functionality, private or permissioned deployments accessible only to team or investors, deployment of auxiliary contracts (e.g., governance tokens) without core protocol functionality, third-party forks or clones not endorsed by the protocol team, wrapped or synthetic versions created by other parties without protocol endorsement, deployment on a different blockchain than specified, or deployment on Layer 2s when the specification is for Layer 1. Resolution will be based on verifiable on-chain records, official protocol communications, blockchain explorers, and reputable crypto news sources.
markets.title: Will GTE deploy on MegaETH mainnet before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the election winner is officially declared or certified.
markets.rules_primary: If the winner of the next Israeli legislative election in 2026 is Bennett 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves based on the official certification or declaration by the relevant electoral authority. For a parliamentary or legislative election, the winner is the party or formal pre-election coalition that wins the most seats in the specified chamber, even if they do not form the government. If there is a tie for the most seats, the winner is the party that enters government; if that doesn't resolve the tie, the winner is the party with the higher share of the vote. If an election is postponed, the contract remains open until the new date, for a maximum of two years. Contested results are resolved based on the final certified outcome by the appropriate electoral authority or highest court with jurisdiction.
markets.subtitle: :: placeholder name
markets.title: Will Bennett 2026 win the next Israeli legislative election?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the coin is delisted from CoinGecko before the measurement time
markets.rules_primary: If MegaETH (MEGAETH)'s fully diluted valuation (FDV) as displayed on CoinGecko is above 8000000000 at exactly 10:00 AM ET on the day after its launch, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The FDV must be the value shown in the "FDV" field on the coin's main CoinGecko page, not calculated from other metrics. If no data is available at the specified time, the last FDV value shown before that time on the date will be used. If the coin is delisted from CoinGecko before the measurement date, the last recorded FDV will be used and the market will resolve immediately. Token migrations to new smart contract addresses are tracked continuously. If CoinGecko changes its FDV calculation methodology, the value displayed at the measurement time under the FDV label will be used regardless. Post-redenomination FDV values (after splits/reverse splits) will be used. All values are in USD as shown on CoinGecko. Values can be expressed in millions (M), billions (B), or trillions (T) format.
markets.title: Will MegaETH FDV be above $8000000000 at 10:00 AM ET on Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the coin is delisted from CoinGecko before the measurement time

markets.rules_secondary: The FDV must be the value shown in the "FDV" field on the coin's main CoinGecko page, not calculated from other metrics. If no data is available at the specified time, the last FDV value shown before that time on the date will be used. If the coin is delisted from CoinGecko before the measurement date, the last recorded FDV will be used and the market will resolve immediately. markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if FIFA officially relocates a U.S.-scheduled match abroad.
markets.rules_primary: If FIFA officially relocates at least one 2026 FIFA World Cup match from a U.S. venue to a venue outside the United States before ||date||, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: A relocation requires FIFA to officially move a match from any U.S. venue (including all 50 states, DC, and U.S. territories) to a venue outside the United States. Official relocations are confirmed through FIFA's updated match schedule, official announcements, or the organizing committee's statements. Moving matches between U.S. venues, date/time changes without venue changes, relocations of non-U.S. matches, temporary changes that are reversed, and changes to training facilities do not qualify. If a match begins in the U.S. but is moved abroad mid-match due to disruption, this resolves to Yes. If the entire tournament is cancelled or postponed to 2027+, this resolves to No. If all U.S. matches are relocated abroad, this resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will any 2026 FIFA World Cup game scheduled in the U.S. be relocated abroad before Jun 11, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If South Carolina redistricts its Congressional districts for the elections in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
New congressional district maps must be formally adopted and enacted into law by the appropriate legislative or redistricting authority; AND not enjoined, vacated, stayed, or struck down in full by any court with jurisdiction over congressional redistricting in the geography as of the Expiration Date; AND in effect for use in the first scheduled federal election after its adoption, then the market resolves to Yes.

 
For clarity: maps that are temporarily stayed pending appeal but later upheld will resolve to "Yes" if they are ultimately in effect by the Expiration Date, maps that are completely redrawn by a court or special master will resolve to "No", maps that are withdrawn by the Legislature before implementation will resolve to "No", and if no new maps are adopted by the date, the market will resolve to "No".
markets.title: What states will redistrict before the 2026 Congressional elections?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the next U.K. election results are announced.
markets.rules_primary: If the Your Party party receives the most seats in the next U.K. general election, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: If two parties tie in seat count, then the party with the highest percentage of the vote will resolve to Yes and the others will resolve to No.
markets.title: Will Your Party win the next U.K. election?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Gavin Newsom is arrested before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will Gavin Newsom be arrested before Jan 2027?

For clarity: maps that are temporarily stayed pending appeal but later upheld will resolve to "Yes" if they are ultimately in effect by the Expiration Date, maps that are completely redrawn by a court or special master will resolve to "No", maps that are withdrawn by the Legislature before implementation will resolve to "No", and if no new maps are adopted by the date, the market will resolve to "No".

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Cluely confirms an IPO before May 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: An IPO is confirmed if 1) the SEC declares the company's Form S-1 effective OR 2) the IPO is priced OR 3) a securities exchange has assigned a ticker to it. As long as any of those events occur, the market will immediately resolve to Yes, even if the company does not start trading until after May 1, 2027.
markets.title: When will Cluely officially announce an IPO?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Missouri redistricts its Congressional districts for the elections in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
New congressional district maps must be formally adopted and enacted into law by the appropriate legislative or redistricting authority; AND not enjoined, vacated, stayed, or struck down in full by any court with jurisdiction over congressional redistricting in the geography as of the Expiration Date; AND in effect for use in the first scheduled federal election after its adoption, then the market resolves to Yes.

 
For clarity: maps that are temporarily stayed pending appeal but later upheld will resolve to "Yes" if they are ultimately in effect by the Expiration Date, maps that are completely redrawn by a court or special master will resolve to "No", maps that are withdrawn by the Legislature before implementation will resolve to "No", and if no new maps are adopted by the date, the market will resolve to "No".
markets.title: What states will redistrict before the 2026 Congressional elections?
